steps.title: Place the tribal figure
steps.content: The student must compare average contribution per employee. Tribal economic activity contributed over 141,000 dollars per employee, so the completion must rank that figure against transportation/warehousing, manufacturing, and health care rather than simply describe total revenue.

steps.title: Check the ranking
steps.content: Choice A is too high because transportation/warehousing is above the tribal figure. Choice C is inaccurate because the tribal figure is above both manufacturing and health care but not nearly equal to transportation/warehousing. Choice D is too low because the tribal figure is above manufacturing and health care. The only ranking that fits is below transportation/warehousing and above the other two industries. The answer is B.
